purpose: Images displayed as a scrolling film strip that focuses on each image in turn. Cinematic aesthetic with sprocket holes. Best for timeline of events, photo sequences, surveillance footage frames.

fields.TITLE_TEXT: Title at top of scene. Example: 'Surveillance Footage — March 14'
fields.ACCENT_COLOR: Highlight color for the focused frame border. Example: #f5c518 (film yellow) or #ff4444
fields.FRAMES_PER_SLIDE: Frames to linger on each focused image. Example: 80 = ~2.6 seconds. Default: 80
fields.IMAGE_URL_1: URL to first uploaded frame. Leave as IMAGE_URL_1 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_2: URL to second uploaded frame. Leave as IMAGE_URL_2 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_3: URL to third uploaded frame. Leave as IMAGE_URL_3 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_4: URL to fourth uploaded frame. Leave as IMAGE_URL_4 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_5: URL to fifth uploaded frame. Leave as IMAGE_URL_5 if not yet uploaded.
fields.IMAGE_URL_6: URL to sixth uploaded frame. Leave as IMAGE_URL_6 if not yet uploaded.
fields.CAPTION_1: Caption shown beneath focused first image. Example: '07:42 AM - Lobby camera'
fields.SUGGESTION_1: Describe exactly what photo or screenshot the user should upload for slot 1. Be specific. Example: 'Upload a screenshot from the lobby security camera at 07:42 AM'
fields.SUGGESTION_2: Describe what to upload for slot 2. Example: 'Upload a screenshot from the stairwell camera'
fields.SUGGESTION_3: Describe what to upload for slot 3. Leave blank if only 2 images are needed.
fields.SUGGESTION_4: Describe what to upload for slot 4. Leave blank if fewer than 4 images are needed.
fields.SUGGESTION_5: Describe what to upload for slot 5. Leave blank if fewer than 5 images are needed.
fields.SUGGESTION_6: Describe what to upload for slot 6. Leave blank if fewer than 6 images are needed.
